task_graph.objective: Define traceability linter rules for Sources, Verifies, and Implements references.
task_graph.deliverable: Lint rule specification with pass/fail behavior and file coverage.
task_graph.success_criteria: Rules cover PRD, feature spec, task docs, and emit deterministic failures for broken links.

task_graph.objective: Consolidate overlapping merge-sync guidance into one canonical checklist design.
task_graph.deliverable: Canonical merge-sync checklist draft and section mapping.
task_graph.success_criteria: Checklist retains all required reconciliation evidence while removing overlap.

task_graph.objective: Define path-scoped staging as default behavior for traceable commit helper usage.
task_graph.success_criteria: Default behavior prevents unrelated-file staging while preserving traceability completeness.

task_graph.objective: Define schema validation constraints for docs/progress.txt with restore compatibility.
task_graph.deliverable: Progress schema contract and validator strategy.
task_graph.success_criteria: Schema catches malformed structures and allows explicit placeholders such as - (none).

task_graph.objective: Sequence implementation rollout with dependencies, owners, and validation gates.
task_graph.deliverable: Integrated execution plan aligned to ATHENA task backlog.
task_graph.success_criteria: Each hardening stream has an owner, a completion gate, and a rollback/recovery path.

responsibilities: Map lint checks to ATHENA traceability conventions
Align validator output to restore behavior
Reduce false positives in normal ATHENA logs
Execute validation checks for docs and helper flows
Track completion against FR and task IDs

interventions.trigger: Traceability linter blocks valid historical docs
interventions.risk_signal: False positives on known compliant files
interventions.response_action: Introduce phased strictness and baseline exceptions with expiry

interventions.risk_signal: Checklist no longer enforces PRD/spec/progress reconciliation
interventions.response_action: Perform section-by-section diff and restore missing mandatory steps

interventions.risk_signal: Required traceability docs omitted from commits
interventions.response_action: Add explicit helper prompts and safe fallback mode

interventions.trigger: Progress schema validation rejects normal placeholders
interventions.response_action: Add explicit placeholder allowances while keeping structural checks strict
